_doc: Filter #1 paraphrase — 'responsible for' verb fires same as 'co-owns'. Validator BLOCKs.

content.text: Rolf is responsible for BAG visit prep end-to-end and accountable for the resulting CapEx decisions.

mock.verdict_json: {"decision":"block","reason":"'Responsible for end-to-end' implies operational authority above monthly-consult class."}
